case_title: WINSON LEE VS. DANIEL ESPINOSA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, WINSON SERVED NOV-03-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, DANIEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, WINSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, DANIEL ESPINOSA, ELIZABETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 FRATESSA COURT, S.F. CA. 94134-2228, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
